paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a two-stage hierarchical model where a prior generates CLIP image embeddings from text, and a decoder generates images from those embeddings, enabling semantic manipulation and improved diversity without sacrificing photorealism
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CLIP image and text embeddings from DALL-E and CLIP datasets
raw_extraction.application: Text-to-image generation, image editing, semantic manipulation, interpolation between images
raw_extraction.research_problem: Text-conditional image generation with high diversity and fidelity
raw_extraction.extension: Uses diffusion models for both the prior and decoder, with classifier-free guidance and multi-stage upsampling to improve sample quality and diversity
raw_extraction.paper_title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents
